items.title: Repositioning retail for the AI era
items.description: Artificial intelligence is rapidly reshaping retail, but not in the ways consumers might immediately notice. items.title: The emergence of the web data infrastructure layer for AI
items.description: AI is booming. New use cases are emerging each day. To capitalize on the technology’s potential, enterprises require data at scale. items.title: Google DeepMind is worried about what happens when millions of agents start to interact
